text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Hey… you know of a good napping spot 
no one else will find?

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: My usual spot is currently, uh… occupied.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: There was this cat… It just looked so comfy…

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: I mean… It's first come, first serve, right?
